contents.description: The pack provides 8 skills and 3 orchestration skills for rh automation workflows on Red Hat platforms; see AGENTS.md for intent routing.

orchestration_skills.description: Orchestrates forensic analysis of failed jobs with event extraction, host correlation, and resolution advisory.
orchestration_skills.name: forensic-troubleshooter
orchestration_skills.summary_markdown:
Orchestrates forensic analysis of failed jobs with event extraction, host correlation, and resolution advisory.
**Use when:**
- "Job #X failed"
- "Analyze the failure"
- "Root cause analysis of job #X"
**What it does:**
- Runs the documented workflow with MCP access only through the skill and required confirmations.
- Aligns with AGENTS.md chaining when users need follow-on skills.

skills_decision_guide.reason: Validator, risk analysis, governed launch, and summary.
Failure analysis, host facts, resolution advice, summary.
Connectivity and tool checks before other AAP skills.
Inventory class, extra_vars scan, scope assessment.

description: Ansible Automation Platform governance, execution safety, and forensic troubleshooting tools for Red Hat automation engineers.
name: Agentic skill pack for Automation Engineers

resources.description: Official AAP documentation for controllers and execution.
resources.title: Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform

resources.description: Source for this pack and catalog metadata.
resources.title: agentic-collections repository

sample_workflows.name: Governed production deploy
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Deploy this job template to production with checks"
- `/governance-executor` validates MCP, analyzes risk, offers check mode, and launches with approvals
- `/execution-summary` captures the audit trail afterward

sample_workflows.name: Forensics after failure
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Job 8841 failed on finance inventory — what happened?"
- `/forensic-troubleshooter` walks failure analysis, host facts, and doc-backed fixes
- `/resolution-advisor` context is included inside that orchestration path

sample_workflows.name: Manual validator then launch
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "I only want risk analysis before I approve launch"
- `/aap-mcp-validator` confirms MCP reachability
- `/execution-risk-analyzer` classifies targets and variables
- `/governed-job-launcher` runs with the agreed mode and gates

summary: The rh-automation collection ships 11 catalogued skills for Red Hat automation workflows described in README and AGENTS.md; orchestration entries coordinate sub-skills with explicit approvals.
